reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio desde San Luis a San Juan, 215 km sin estaciones
Podría estar mejor acondicionada.
Shop un poco limitado, no tiene mesas

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station between San Luis and San Juan, a 215 km stretch with no other stations. It could be better equipped. The shop is a bit limited and has no tables.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlMzVXZ0x3EAE

reviews.comment:
Amable la atención. No hay para cargar agua al termo fuera de 7 a 21 que es la atención del servicompra.
Pero no es problema de la empresa en si, si no de todo el Encón. Mucho desorden.

(Translated by Google)
The service was friendly. There's no way to refill the water cooler outside of the 7 am to 9 pm service hours.

But that's not a problem with the company itself, but with the entire Encón. Very disorganized.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbF9EMWlnRRAB

The service wasn't great, but it's a good place to stop and stretch your legs before continuing your hike. I was there in September 2022.

reviews.comment:
Siempre el mismo problema SE QUEDAN SIN COMBUSTIBLE, tenerlo en cuenta para llenar el tanque antes y llevar bidones con combustible, entre Encon y San Luis es la única estación de servicio y NO hay que contar con ella, a veces pienso que lo hacen a propósito porque mágicamente aparece una mujer vendiendo nafta al doble de precio o dicen que lo único que les queda es Infinia. Debería haber otra estación más cerca de San Luis y estoy seguro que dejarían de quedarse sin combustible

(Translated by Google)
It's always the same problem: they run out of fuel. Keep that in mind and fill up beforehand, and bring jerrycans of fuel. Between Encon and San Luis, it's the only gas station, and you can't count on it. Sometimes I think they do it on purpose because magically a woman appears selling gasoline at double the price, or they say the only thing they have left is Infinia. There should be another station closer to San Luis, and I'm sure they'd stop running out of fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURldHRTQk1BEAE
